---
title: "Lady Laura Elizabeth Ridding"
---

## Lady Laura Elizabeth Ridding

**Dates:** (1849-1939)

**Maiden name:** (Palmer)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874, 91, 98)

### Biography

The daughter of the 1st Earl of Selborne, she married (October 1876), as his second wife, George Ridding. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893
- Letter from June 1st [1886?]
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Nov 21st 1877 
- Letter from [26 September 1874]
- Letter from Aug 13th 1874
- Letter from July 21st 1874
- Letter from July 14th 1874
- Letter from Jany 20th 1874

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
